title: DiagnosticsRedactionPolicy
description: Declares how a DiagnosticsBundle was transformed from raw local artifacts into a share-safe artifact set.

mode.description: Overall redaction mode used for the bundle capture and export flow.

rawArtifactRetained.description: Whether the unredacted raw artifact set was retained locally after capture.

sharedArtifactGenerated.description: Whether a redacted share-safe artifact set was generated from the raw bundle.

deterministicMasking.description: Whether masking was deterministic for repeated occurrences of the same secret or identifier within the bundle.

maskedClasses.description: Sensitive value classes the redaction pass was configured to mask.

privateIpMasked.description: Whether RFC1918 and similar local/private IP addresses were masked in the shared artifact set.

publicIpMasked.description: Whether public IP addresses were masked in the shared artifact set.

macAddressMasked.description: Whether MAC addresses were masked in the shared artifact set.

notes.description: Optional operator note describing any bundle-specific masking deviations or caveats.
